name: Oysters a La Bookbinder
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and shuck the oysters, placing them on their half shell.
2. In a skillet, sauté the mushrooms and onion in 1 tablespoon butter until soft but not browned.
3. Add flour to the skillet and stir to blend. Pour in milk and continue stirring until thickened.
4. Stir in the cooked oatmeal until well combined. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Mix in the minced parsley.
6. Place oysters under the broiler for 4 minutes, then remove from heat.
7. Cover each oyster with a portion of the sauce.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the top of each oyster.
9. Melt 2 tablespoons butter and drizzle a few drops over the oysters.
10. Return to the broiler and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until browned.
